title: Unit 06 Has an S2 Engine
wikitext:
[]: Unit 06 Has an S2 Engine             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:09 pm It has a halo. It can fly. Therefore, it almost definitely has an S2 Engine. Discuss implications.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:11 pm Is that its wang hanging down between its legs? And also: That's a lot of moons.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:12 pm Maybe it'll kick Bardiel's ass during that battle? Or Kaworu would just use Eva-06 if/when he goes to see Lilith instead of hijacking 02? Other than that, not sure. Unless I misunderstood what you meant by implications. EDIT: Actually, it looks like Eva-06 has a tail? Anyway, I'm starting to wonder if Moon Giant is just Eva-06 in a suit since MG has something that looks like a core...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:16 pm Note that an Eva having an S2 Engine doesn't necessarily make it a "god" like Unit 01. In the original series, Unit 01 became "god" because it was a Lilith-type organism, which had the Fruit of Knowledge, and gained the S2 Engine, the Fruit of Life. Most of the Evangelions are Adam-type, and Unit 06 is probably no different.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:31 pm I agree with NAW, and the "tail" is most likely the cod-piece the most evas have.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Oct 13, 2008 10:33 pm all I know for sure is that it has a really weird head shape by eva standards. Who's idea was it stick all the gundam shit on around it's ears?

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Tue Oct 14, 2008 1:43 am Hm. It's quite a menacing Eva in appearance, maybe this design is a mere foreshadow for the personality of its pilot, or maybe its role in the upcoming film?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Oct 14, 2008 2:31 am Looks like a cylon centurion.... new model

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Tue Oct 14, 2008 3:58 am BrikHaus wrote: Is that its wang hanging down between its legs?

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Oct 14, 2008 6:31 am Not necessarily, it might just mean it's got a Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Oct 14, 2008 9:13 am Zaiku wrote: Because, all Eva's have the soul of the pilot's mother and since Fem-Kaworu is female, then his mother must be a man! Thus allowing the Eva to grow a wang! Either that, or it's the codpiece, I'll leave that decision to those who are less crazy than me.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Oct 14, 2008 6:28 pm But Asuka is female, and her Eva's soul is that of her mother. So why would Fem-Kaworu's be any different (and have we forgotten so quickly that Kaworu has no parents)? Just a rational counterpoint that I'll likely be chewed out extensively for because I'm taking it too seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Tue Oct 14, 2008 10:40 pm It definitely appears to possess the ability to fly; however, the question still remains, whether it has an S2 engine or not, is how can it do so? The Harpies in End of Evangelion contained S2 engines too, right? yet they needed wings in order to defeat the laws of gravity. I know that we haven't seen the Harpies in Rebuild, but it troubles me how this Eva lacks a means of maintaining flight.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Oct 14, 2008 11:25 pm Dramamine wrote: It definitely appears to possess the ability to fly; however, the question still remains, whether it has an S2 engine or not, is how can it do so? The Harpies in End of Evangelion contained S2 engines too, right? yet they needed wings in order to defeat the laws of gravity. I know that we haven't seen the Harpies in Rebuild, but it troubles me how this Eva lacks a means of maintaining flight.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Tue Oct 14, 2008 11:36 pm Well... I guess holding onto conventional mechanics, like that of wings, in the Eva universe is ridiculous. Also, why hasn't anyone brought up the overlapping moons in the background? Could this have any significance whatsoever over the Eva? ...eh?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Oct 14, 2008 11:48 pm Dramamine wrote: Also, why hasn't anyone brought up the overlapping moons in the background? Could this have any significance whatsoever over the Eva? ...eh?

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Tue Oct 14, 2008 11:58 pm Anyways. The Eva does have a halo, and I'm going to state my belief that it possesses a S2 engine, I see no reason why it wouldn't.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed Oct 15, 2008 1:20 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: But Asuka is female, and her Eva's soul is that of her mother. So why would Fem-Kaworu's be any different (and have we forgotten so quickly that Kaworu has no parents)? Just a rational counterpoint that I'll likely be chewed out extensively for because I'm taking it too seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Nov 12, 2008 9:42 pm cat42 wrote: Plus, who says it's flying? It could just be controlling its fall (there is a difference).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 12, 2008 10:04 pm cat42 wrote: It has no significance. It is the aftereffect of cutting several frame grabs together in a scene where both the Eva and the moon are moving.
summary:
[]: Unit 06 Has an S2 Engine             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:09 pm It has a halo. It can fly. Therefore, it almost definitely has an S2 Engine. Discuss implications.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Oct 13, 2008 9:11 pm Is that its wang hanging down between its legs? And also: That's a lot of moons.

[]:        &nbsp
